title: Deprecated API Migration Guide — v1.27
text:
The
v1.27
release stopped serving the following deprecated API versions:
The
storage.k8s.io/v1beta1
API version of CSIStorageCapacity is no longer served as of v1.27.
Migrate manifests and API clients to use the
storage.k8s.io/v1
API version, available since v1.24.
All existing persisted objects are accessible via the new API
No notable changes
